live.title: Rajasthan United FC vs Sreenidi Deccan FC - 24 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Rajasthan United FC face Sreenidi Deccan FC with both sides pushing to strengthen their positions in the upper half of the table. Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: Rajasthan United FC face Sreenidi Deccan FC with both sides pushing to strengthen their positions in the upper half of the table. Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
